summary: Generated Excel-driven dry-run plan for 26 checklist row(s); 12 mapped to Sangfor product consoles.

workPlan.description: Anti-Spam | ③Malware Infection Prevention | 스팸 메일과 바이러스에 감염된 이메일이 내부 네트워크로 유입되는 것을 차단하는 정책이 마련되어 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Using SPAMOUT email filtering system, but controlled by HQ. No control over the tool
workPlan.target:
O: Controlling spam and virus email inflow through a dedicated spam mail system (with a separate spam filtering solution in place).
△: Applying spam and virus control features provided by webmail services (excluding commercial webmail).
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Anti-Spam | ⑦Incident Analysis and Response | 이벤트 로그와 감사 로그는 지정된 기간(최소 1년) 동안 보존됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Logs retained for less than 1 year
workPlan.target:
O: Retaining event logs for at least one year.
△: Retaining event logs with some missing records or for less than one year.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Anti-Virus | ③Malware Infection Prevention | 조직 내 모든 PC와 서버에 안티바이러스 및 EDR과 같은 악성코드 탐지 솔루션이 설치되어 실행 중입니까?
workPlan.currentGap:
Using Crowdstrike and Alyac
Need additional evidence to see the list of assets and the installation status (Alyac and Crowdstrike)
workPlan.target:
O: Applying to all servers and PCs.
△: Partially omitted in application to servers or PCs.
evidence: endpoint agent inventory and update status
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Anti-Virus | ③Malware Infection Prevention | 바이러스 백신 엔진은 정기적으로 업데이트됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No regular engine update verification procedure
workPlan.target:
O: Applying antivirus engine updates on all servers and management PCs at least once a week.
△: Having partial omissions or updating less than once per week.
evidence: endpoint agent inventory and update status
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Anti-Virus | ③Malware Infection Prevention | 바이러스 백신 및 EDR 솔루션을 사용하여 주기적인 검사가 수행됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Scan scheduled at lunch daily
workPlan.target:
O: Configuring regular malware scans on all servers and management PCs at least once per day.
△: Having partial omissions or scanning less than once per day.
evidence: endpoint agent inventory and update status
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Anti-Virus | ③Malware Infection Prevention | 바이러스 백신 및 EDR 프로그램이 임의로 제거되거나 비활성화되지 않도록 보장됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No explicit gap text; verify checklist result and current console state.
workPlan.target:
O: Ensuring that server-based AntiVirus or EDR solutions cannot be uninstalled or disabled (Self-Protection enabled).
△: Having partial omissions in applying self-protection features.
evidence: endpoint agent inventory and update status
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Anti-Virus | ⑦Incident Analysis and Response | 악성코드 탐지 로그와 격리된 파일은 지정된 기간(최소 1년) 동안 보관됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No files are retained, only logs are searchable through crowdstrike console. Also, need a verification from Alyac
workPlan.target:
O: Retaining event logs on the central management server for at least one year.
△: Having partial omissions or retaining event logs for less than one year (including local PCs).
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Software Control | ③Malware Infection Prevention | 조직 내에서 승인되지 않은 소프트웨어 사용은 감시 및 통제되고 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No application control or monitoring
workPlan.target:
O: Managing control status (software blocking policies, exception cases) and ensuring visibility on the administrator dashboard.
△: Having partial omissions in control status management.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Software Control | ⑦Incident Analysis and Response | 무단 소프트웨어 탐지/차단 로그 및 감사 로그(정책 변경, 권한 변경 등)는 지정된 기간(최소 1년) 동안 보관됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No application control or monitoring
workPlan.target:
O: Retaining event logs for at least one year.
△: Having partial omissions or retaining logs for less than one year.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Device Control | ⑤Information Leakage Prevention | 조직 내 저장 매체 사용은 통제되고 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No device control or monitoring (Only automatic scans)
workPlan.target:
O: Controlling all departments or enforcing the use of secure USBs.
△: Controlling only some departments
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Device Control | ⑦Incident Analysis and Response | 저장 매체 차단/사용 로그 및 감사 로그(정책 변경, 권한 변경 등)는 지정된 기간(최소 1년) 동안 보존됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No device control or monitoring (Only automatic scans)
workPlan.target:
O: Retaining event logs for at least one year.
△: Having partial omissions or retaining logs for less than one year.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open ENDPOINT_SECURE console, navigate to Policy > Malware/Ransomware Protection, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Data Loss Prevention | ⑤Information Leakage Prevention | 내부 데이터의 외부 유출을 감지하기 위해 데이터 손실 방지(DLP) 시스템이 구현되어 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No DLP implemented
workPlan.target:
O: Implementing a Data Loss Prevention (DLP) system with an alert function for large-scale internal data transfers.
△: Not configuring alerts for data transfers or missing DLP application on some devices.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Data Loss Prevention | ⑦Incident Analysis and Response | 대용량 첨부 파일(예: 50MB 이상) 전송 기록은 지정된 기간(최소 1년) 동안 보관됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No DLP implemented
workPlan.target:
O: Retaining event logs for at least one year.
△: Having partial omissions or retaining logs for less than one year.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Network Access Contro | ②Unauthorized External Access Defense | 조직 내에서 승인되지 않은 장치의 접근을 제한하기 위해 네트워크 접근 제어가 시행되고 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No NAC implemented
workPlan.target:
O: Controlling network access through systems such as NAC and IP scanning.
△: Managing network access with some manual restrictions (e.g., manually opening IP/Port upon request).
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open IAG console, navigate to Policy > Access Control, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Network Access Contro | ②Unauthorized External Access Defense | 보안 프로그램 설치가 필수이며, 해당 프로그램이 설치되지 않은 경우 네트워크 접속이 차단됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No NAC implemented
workPlan.target:
O: Enforcing security solution installation via system automation.
△: Installing the security solution manually.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open IAG console, navigate to Policy > Access Control, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Network Access Contro | ⑦Incident Analysis and Response | 이벤트 로그와 감사 로그는 지정된 기간(최소 1년) 동안 보존됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No NAC implemented
workPlan.target:
O: Retaining event logs for at least one year.
△: Having partial omissions or retaining logs for less than one year.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open IAG console, navigate to Logs > Internet Access Logs, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Log Management | ①Intrusion Threat Detection | 다양한 보안 솔루션의 이벤트 로그와 감사 로그는 중앙에서 관리됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No SIEM implemented but Auvik collects network logs
workPlan.target:
O: Centrally managing security system logs (with a log management solution in place, including firewall, antivirus, and DLP).
△: Centrally managing security system logs with a log management solution, but with some missing logs.
evidence: endpoint agent inventory and update status
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open NDR console, navigate to Events > Event Sources, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Log Management | ①Intrusion Threat Detection | 시스템 및 보안 로그는 정기적으로 검토됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: No regular monitoring - only by events. No events are assigned so appears as no one is actually reviewing them
workPlan.target:
O: Reviewing system and security logs from security solutions at least once a month.
△: Reviewing security logs at least once per quarter or semi-annually.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Open NDR console, navigate to Events > Event Sources, capture current configuration evidence, stop before Save/Apply.

workPlan.description: Security Monitoring | ①Intrusion Threat Detection | 보안 시스템 로그(예: 방화벽, VPN, IPS, WAF)가 보안 모니터링과 통합되어 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap:
No network security logs are actively monitored
Crowdstrike is monitored by Packetwatch
workPlan.target:
O: Integrating all security systems with security monitoring, including those for intrusion detection and prevention.
△: Some intrusion detection and prevention security systems are not integrated with security monitoring.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Security Monitoring | ①Intrusion Threat Detection | 이상 징후 탐지 기준이 설정되어 있고, 이상 징후가 감지되는 즉시 관리자에게 이메일이나 SMS로 알림을 보내는 경보 시스템이 구성되어 있습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Only alert from Crowdstrike is sent out to ITAC
workPlan.target:
O: Establishing detection criteria and immediately verifying and responding to alerts.
△: Establishing detection criteria with alert notifications enabled.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Backup Management | ⑥System Recovery | 복구 우선순위와 복구 목표가 수립되었습니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Outdated
workPlan.target:
O: Establishing specific and valid backup objectives (RTO, RPO, etc.).
△: Having a backup framework in place but with some deficiencies.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Backup Management | ⑥System Recovery | 핵심 애플리케이션, 데이터베이스 및 중요 파일은 매일 또는 정기적으로 백업됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Biweekly backups
workPlan.target:
O: Ensuring backup is performed with physical/logical separation.
△: Performing backups without separation, posing a risk of infection.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Backup Management | ⑥System Recovery | 백업 데이터의 무결성은 정기적으로 검증됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Backup done monthly
workPlan.target:
O: Conducting integrity verification of backup data (e.g., hash value checks).
△: Having partial omissions inConducting integrity verification of backup data
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Backup Management | ⑥System Recovery | 백업 데이터는 안전한 저장소에 저장됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Stored on offline servers
workPlan.target:
O: Storing backup data in a physically secure environment with access control (e.g., spatial separation, network access management, locking mechanisms).
△: Having partial deficiencies in physical security and access control for backup data storage.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Backup Management | ⑥System Recovery | 백업 및 복구 테스트는 정기적으로 계획되고 실행됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Backups tested monthly, but recovery not tested
workPlan.target:
O: Conducting disaster recovery training at least once per year.
△: Establishing a disaster recovery plan and conducting training at least once.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

workPlan.description: Backup Management | ⑥System Recovery | 보안 솔루션 구성 및 보안 정책은 정기적으로 백업됩니까?
workPlan.currentGap: Only firewall config is backed up
workPlan.target:
O: Performing backups at least once per quarter.
△: Having partial omissions in backups or performing backups less than once per quarter.
workPlan.dryRunAction: Do not access Sangfor console. Collect external/manual evidence and attach to review.

executionGates: sessionId is required for Playwright console dry-run.
Local Chrome must expose a CDP endpoint for existing-browser operation.
Dry-run may navigate and collect screenshots, but must not click Save/Apply/Delete or execute response actions.
Rows mapped to external_or_manual are reported for manual/non-Sangfor handling.
